enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a rambling life update from Boulder, explaining he has pulled back from YouTube because he got obsessively focused on building his personal website. He shares he has been heavily using cannabis (pen vape, wax, shatter, hash), had a YouTube subscriber visit who smoked with him, and plans to convert his fireplace into a terrarium/garden. He also enthuses about the book 'Atlantis: The Antediluvian World' by Ignatius Donnelly, which he has been listening to on repeat.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Has lost motivation to post daily vlogs; videos were getting boring and repetitive; may not return for a year
Uses it heavily and enthusiastically; believes it enhances creativity and website design work; vape pen is cheapest and best for lungs
Most fascinating book he has ever read; believes Atlantis was real and the evidence Donnelly presents is compelling
Being in your own world is freeing; even homelessness with a laptop is a valid path if you want true independence
